back_regions.name: back_col_a
back_regions.label: Column A (pitch)
back_regions.text:
The League of Amazing Programmers runs hands-on coding and robotics programs for kids all across San Diego — giving them a real chance to explore their technical interests, often for the first time.

Every Tech Club we open puts that opportunity within reach of a new neighborhood.

back_regions.name: back_col_b
back_regions.label: Column B (pitch)
back_regions.text:
We need your help to grow. Your support lets us bring this opportunity to every quarter of San Diego — every school, every neighborhood, every kid curious enough to try.

Scan to learn more and join us.

back_regions.name: back_nonprofit
back_regions.label: QR caption — nonprofit/EIN
back_regions.text: The League of Amazing Programmers is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit. EIN 20-4744610
